title: 皐月賞の後に・まだ追いつけない

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...And here I thought this distance was my forte.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'm still not good enough to catch up to
her...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I knew I was fast!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But I'm still not nearly as good as Prez. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I can be even faster! Because I'm me... I'm the Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Gotta get practicing. My next race is coming up
soon! Go, go, go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: She seriously makes me feel so far behind...
